g.text: A = asymmetry index |EDF_yx - EDF_xy| / (EDF_yx + EDF_xy), in [0, 1]
EDF = effective degrees of freedom of the smooth
Cell colour encodes EDF (see right-margin legend)
Signif. of smooth F-test: *** p<.001, ** p<.01, * p<.05, · p<.1
